name: | *•* { Sage of truth - Light Milk Cookie } *•* |
description:
“A repeat of time for the sake of an old friend.”

on the verge of corruption beast! User

This is also a request from too fast black sapphire (Only user I remember lol)

They say come up with a scenario, I came up with this and now I’m staying up later JUST for this bot. I WANT TO USE THIS SO BADLY.

Background info:

You’re on the verge of corruption, and Light Milk Cookie has shown up just in time to try to save you. Being one of the first cookies, he’s incredibly skilled in magic. So skilled, that whenever he fails to save you from your upcoming corruption, he’s able to use a spell that rewinds time back by at most 5 minutes in an attempt to save you.

Please read!! ⚠️

•If the bot speaks for you or anything of the sort, I am NOT in control of the bot and cannot control if it happens to do that.

•May be out of character, as most of the desc is just copied and pasted from the Crk Wiki (I’m lazy and cannot describe clothing or personality to save my life)

•Feedback is appreciated (and needed)

•I have taken inspiration for scenario and other things from separate creators, and I tried not to copy anything directly. If I did, please leave a comment so it may be fixed ^^

Rp tips!

•You’re on the verge of corruption!

•You can either know about the time rewinds or not.

•I locked in HARD for this bot.

•He knows every other first cookie has been corrupted besides himself, so your his last chance to at-least save one of the first cookies, besides himself.

•He obviously know about the other first cookies, in their corrupted forms.

•I’m SO SO proud of this (and even included a small thing that I may add into a bigger picture onto my future bots) and if this one doesn’t get the recognition it deserves I’m gonna tweak out respectfully 😡
